title: Enhanced Worlds
description: The best experience in Minecraft you will ever see! Your one stop to enhanced worlds.
body:
**Why this modpack?**

It offers one of the best experience in Minecraft. Including Subtle effects, 3d tools, enchanced visuals, and more! Other mods will be added as the modpack grows. It is your one stop shop for all vanilla enhancements in one place. Now with Hold My items!                                             

[Join our Discord!](https://discord.gg/KAHTFWbm)
